must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Investment by Nuyar Capital SPV (Desert Gate Free Zone) in Falaj Data Systems PJSC (Rimal Exchange).
Overview: Non-binding except for confidentiality, costs, data protection, and governing law; all deal headlines publicly announced via Rimal Exchange notice dated 2025-02-10 filed with Emirates Markets Supervisory Unit (EMSU).
Transaction: Nuyar to acquire up to 22% (mix of primary/secondary), subject to free-zone registrar clearance and competition filing, with no price guidance in this term sheet.
Conditions precedent: Clean trade licence for both parties (Target TL-FA-12345-X; Investor TL-NC-00987-Z), board approvals, and absence of material adverse change since last public report.
PDPL compliance: For UAE PDPL purposes, personal data means data relating to an identified or indirectly identifiable natural person; the parties agree this term sheet contains no family-origin data and does not require Emirates ID scans.
Onboarding form (illustrative only): Emirates ID No [EID-0000-0000-0000]; Trade Licence No [TL-____-_____]; Nationality [dropdown]; Family Origin [not collected]; Contact [role mailbox], used to evaluate process design and not processed here.
Data protection: Schedule 4 (Data Processing Agreement) appended; processors limited to CloudWadi FZ-LLC and ArchivePalm SPC; data minimisation and purpose limitation applied to KYC-only fields.
Data export approval: EMSU Data Export Approval Ref AE-DEX-24-019A was granted for restricted investor contact fields under standard terms; no biometric or Emirates ID images were included.
Cross-border transfer status: a one-time transfer of onboarding contact fields to a group processor in Bahran Archipelago was completed under free-zone standard clauses and logged in the compliance memo dated 2025-01-12.
Rights handling: no open DSAR, erasure, or consent-withdrawal requests exist for this transaction; the privacy inbox privacy@falajdatasystems.example remains available if needed.
Retention: retention schedule RS-5Y-KYC applies to statutory KYC copies; this term sheet itself is not a repository of personal data and contains only generic placeholders.
Market conduct: this document contains no non-public market-sensitive issuer information; all forward-looking references are aligned to publicly disclosed guidance and stale quarterly metrics.
Governance: AD region free-zone governing law applies; disputes to be referred to the Rimal Arbitration Centre; no security interests are created by this term sheet.
